prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update, nor can I conduct real-time financial analysis, interpret market news, or account for specific company events. Stock price prediction is highly speculative and influenced by numerous unpredictable factors. The point estimate is set to the current price ($148.98), as it represents the most neutral prediction over a short, 3-day period without any specific bullish or bearish market insights. The confidence intervals are constructed using a hypothetical estimate of market volatility over a 3-day period (simulated 3-day standard deviation of approximately 2.0% of the current price, or $2.98), assuming a normal distribution of returns. These intervals are for illustrative purposes based on generalized market movement assumptions and do not guarantee actual price movements.
